summary: Completed testing of Caca Radar iteration 9 features: Clean route analysis, registration requirements, weekly digest system, profile sharing, and language support

critical_bugs.issue: Anonymous report creation still allowed - returns 200 instead of 401
critical_bugs.impact: Contradicts requirement that registration is required before report/vote

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 'Usuario no encontrado' for valid user IDs

medium_priority_bugs.issue: Returns 403 for unauthenticated users instead of 401
Free users can access leaderboard (should require subscription)
medium_priority_bugs.impact: Premium feature accessible to free users

working_features: Clean route endpoint correctly requires premium subscription for authenticated users
Weekly digest preview and admin digest trigger working correctly
Store links endpoint returns correct App Store and Play Store URLs

ui_bugs.issue: Language dropdown not opening properly in automated tests

working_features: Map page loads correctly with all UI elements
Report drawer opens and shows proper content policy warning
Language selector shows all 11 required languages (ES, EN, DE, NL, PL, AR, UK, RU, EU, CA, VAL)
New languages (Basque, Catalan, Valencian) are present
Submit button correctly disabled when location not available

passed_tests: Weekly digest preview and admin trigger
Language support (11 languages including new Basque/Catalan/Valencian)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI loads correctly, language support working, minor interaction issues)

critical_fixes: Fix anonymous report creation - should return 401 and require registration
Fix user share profile endpoint - currently returns 404 for valid users
medium_priority_fixes: Fix leaderboard access control - should require subscription
Improve error status codes consistency (401 vs 403)
verification_needed: Test registration requirement enforcement in frontend
Verify profile sharing functionality works end-to-end
